description: You are a rendezvous and proximity operations (RPO) engineer at a space servicing company. Design and execute a two-impulse phasing maneuver for the chaser spacecraft (CHASER) to reach a 5 km trailing formation with the target (CHIEF). Both spacecraft are in a 450 km altitude circular orbit, with CHASER currently 14.84 degrees behind CHIEF (~100 km separation). The final state must have CHASER within 8 km along-track separation of CHIEF and within 5 km of the 450 km altitude. Each delta-V burn must be between 1 m/s and 100 m/s. Save the script to ~/Documents/missions/rendezvous_phasing.script and write a summary to ~/GMAT_output/rendezvous_results.txt including the following values: DeltaV1_mps, DeltaV2_mps, PhasingTime_hours, FinalSeparation_km, and CHASER_final_altitude_km. Login: username=ga, password=password123.
